name: LogiFlow AI
description: A production-grade AI infrastructure platform designed to combine platform engineering, distributed systems, AI operations, and cloud-native automation.

features.title: AI Gateway
features.detail: Provides multi-provider LLM routing (OpenAI, Anthropic, vLLM/Ollama), semantic caching, prompt versioning, cost governance, rate limiting, and circuit breakers.

features.title: MCP Server Integration
features.detail: Model Context Protocol implementation allowing secure tool exposure and agent interoperability with JWT-secured access.

features.title: Multi-Agent Workflow Engine
features.detail: Uses Temporal for durable execution, human-in-the-loop approvals, long-running workflows, and Saga-based compensation patterns.

features.title: RAG Platform
features.detail: Real-time document ingestion, vector indexing, hybrid search, and context assembly pipelines.

features.title: Kubernetes Operator
features.detail: Automated tenant provisioning, namespace management, resource quotas, network policies, and multi-tenant isolation.

name: LogiSynapse
description: A large-scale distributed logistics platform designed to demonstrate production-grade backend and platform engineering practices.

features.title: Shipment Service
features.detail: Built in Go with gRPC APIs and PostgreSQL database, using an event-driven architecture.

features.title: Route Engine & ETA Predictor
features.detail: Calculates ETA predictions using high-performance routing workflows and support for ML integrations.

features.title: Workflow Orchestrator
features.detail: Temporal workflows designed to automate complex logistics operations and business processes with resilient retry and fallback mechanics.

features.title: Real-Time Notifications
features.detail: Uses RabbitMQ and WebSockets to push live shipment updates and location tracking directly to clients.

features.title: GraphQL Gateway
features.detail: A federated gateway combining microservices under a single schema, translating external requests to internal gRPC calls.

name: Enterprise Authentication Platform
description: A standalone authentication and identity platform designed around enterprise-grade security and multi-tenancy requirements.

features.title: Identity & OIDC Server
features.detail: Full OAuth2 and OpenID Connect authorization server for identity provisioning and federation.

features.title: Multi-Tenant Isolation
features.detail: Tenant isolation, role-based access control (RBAC), and multi-tenant user authentication.

features.title: MFA & API Key Management
features.detail: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) and API key lifecycle management (creation, rotation, scoping, and deprecation).

features.title: Security & Auditing
features.detail: Enforces session management policies, device trust scoring, and maintains immutable audit logs pushed to Kafka.
